---
title: 'Mosaic: Cross-Platform User-Interaction Record and Replay for the Fragmented
  Android Ecosystem'
author:
- Matthew Halpern
- Yuhao Zhu
- Ramesh Peri
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ispass15.pdf
talk_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ispass15-slides.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/Matthalp/mosaic
journ: ISPASS
year: 2015
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 9
---
